svg.title: Metrics activity refreshing
svg.desc: Temporary fallback while the metrics workflow regenerates recent repository activity.
svg.text: The previous render returned an unexpected activity-plugin error, so this fallback is shown temporarily.
The workflow has been simplified to a more stable event filter and will retry automatically on the next master push or scheduled run.
If it still fails afterwards, the account event feed is likely not returning supported public activity for this plugin.
